items.summary: This specification defines the foundational architecture and core components for a production-grade GitLab deployment. The system implements a three-tier archi…

items.title: Executive Summary
items.summary: This specification defines the foundational architecture and core components for a production-grade GitLab deployment. The system implements a three-tier archi…

items.title: System Architecture Overview
items.summary: The infrastructure employs a load balancer-centric architecture utilizing defense-in-depth security principles and Infrastructure as Code methodologies.

items.title: Architectural Pattern
items.summary: The infrastructure employs a load balancer-centric architecture utilizing defense-in-depth security principles and Infrastructure as Code methodologies.

items.title: Design Principles
items.summary: - Separation of Concerns: Each tier maintains distinct responsibilities

items.title: Load Balancer Configuration
items.summary: The load balancer tier provides high availability and traffic distribution capabilities.

items.title: Technical Specifications
items.summary: The load balancer tier provides high availability and traffic distribution capabilities.

items.title: High Availability Features
items.summary: - Active-Passive Clustering: Automatic failover between load balancer instances

items.title: GitLab Core Services
items.summary: The application tier hosts GitLab components with resource allocation optimized for production workloads.

items.title: Deployment Architecture
items.summary: The application tier hosts GitLab components with resource allocation optimized for production workloads.

items.title: Service Dependencies
items.summary: - Database Layer: PostgreSQL cluster with synchronous replication

items.title: Dynamic Runner Infrastructure
items.summary: The runner tier provides elastic compute capacity for CI/CD pipeline execution.

items.title: Runner Pool Configuration
items.summary: The runner tier provides elastic compute capacity for CI/CD pipeline execution.

items.title: Scaling Behavior
items.summary: - Demand-Based Scaling: Automatic scaling based on job queue depth

items.title: Performance Baselines
items.summary: - Request Latency: P95 latency under 500ms for web requests

items.title: Dependencies and Integration Points
items.summary: - DNS Resolution: Requires valid DNS entries for service discovery

items.title: External Dependencies
items.summary: - DNS Resolution: Requires valid DNS entries for service discovery

items.title: Internal Dependencies
items.summary: - Kubernetes Platform: Requires functional Kubernetes cluster
